details: Session 013 initialized. Creativity constraint: tool/technique transfer (mod 5 = 3).
Scout dispatched with tool/technique transfer creativity constraint. Broad pool of 5-6 candidates requested.
Literature verification complete. 5 targets verified DISJOINT (0.91-0.97 confidence). Zero cross-field papers found for EVT x Proteome Tm. Primary dataset confirmed: Meltome Atlas PRIDE PXD011929.
Target evaluation complete. 5 targets scored. Top: EVT x Proteome Thermal Vulnerability (TE composite 8.25, popularity 9/10, local-optima 10/10). Selected Target 1 for generation.

Computational validation complete. Overall readiness: HIGH. 9/10 checks passed. Meltome Atlas PXD011929 confirmed. STRING HSP90/HSP70 scores 0.939-0.999. Sample sizes adequate for GEV/POT fitting. Independence concern flagged (complex co-aggregation r=0.75-0.83) with mitigation strategy (cluster-maxima).

Generator dispatched for cycle 1. Target: EVT x Proteome Thermal Vulnerability (DISJOINT 0.97, TE composite 8.25, computational readiness HIGH). Bridge: GEV fitting, return levels, tail index, POT, Fisher-Tippett-Gnedenko. Key concerns forwarded: independence (use cluster-maxima), left-censoring (Tm<30C), Weibull domain prediction.

Generation complete: 7 hypotheses (H1-H7), 6 distinct bridge mechanisms. Confidence range 4-7. Groundedness: 2 HIGH, 5 MEDIUM. 3 claims downgraded from GROUNDED to PARAMETRIC during self-critique. cycle1-raw.json created.
Critic dispatched for cycle 1. 7 hypotheses (H1-H7) from generation. EVT x Proteome Thermal Vulnerability.

Critique complete. 5 survived (H1 SURVIVES, H2 WOUNDED, H3 WOUNDED, H5 WOUNDED, H7 WOUNDED). 2 killed (H4, H6). Kill reasons: H4 quantitative impossibility + wrong direction; H6 data-type mismatch (extremal index requires temporal/sequential data). Citation errors found: H2 Mateus 2020 Science (fabricated DOI), H7 Drummond 2005 Cell (should be PNAS).

Ranking complete. 5 hypotheses scored on 6 dimensions + cross-domain bonus (+0.5). Top 4 selected for QG: H2 (8.45), H1 (7.85), H3 (6.40), H7 (6.15). H5 excluded (5.95, prior art from Bresson 2024). Elo tournament confirms linear ranking. Diversity check: no adjustment needed.

Evolver completed for cycle 1. 4 hypotheses evolved (E-H2 specification, E-H1 specification, E-H3 specification, E-H7 mutation). IDP pre-filtering added to E-H3 to repair model misspecification. Diversity check: 0 convergent pairs found. Quality check: PASSED. cycle1-evolved.json written.

Quality Gate complete. 21 web searches + 4 citation verifications. Verdicts: H1 PASS (8.45), H2 CONDITIONAL_PASS (8.15, correct TPCA attribution), H3 FAIL (IDP model misspecification), H7 CONDITIONAL_PASS (7.00, correct Drummond citation). 3 hypotheses advancing.

Session analysis complete. Strategy: converging_vocabularies (top-tier, 2nd primary test). Highest disciplinary distance session in pipeline history (avg 3.0/3.0). Kill pattern: data-type mismatch for mathematical bridge concepts. New failure mode: IDP model misspecification. session-analysis.md + meta-insights.md updated.
Convergence Scanner dispatched for 3 passing hypotheses (H1, H2, H7). Searching ClinicalTrials.gov, NIH Reporter, patents, partial mechanism confirmations.
Dataset Evidence Miner dispatched for 3 passing hypotheses (H1, H2, H7). Querying HPA, GWAS Catalog, ChEMBL, UniProt, PDB, STRING, KEGG for claim-level evidence.

Session 2026-03-27-scout-013 completed. Status: SUCCESS. 3 hypotheses passed QG (1 PASS + 2 CONDITIONAL_PASS). Cycle decision: early_complete. EES: 7.01. IPS: 4.0. Upload attempted: 401 (no contributor key).
